---
title: "Multiple Testing: FWER and FDR Assignment"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

This report documents your implementation of multiple-testing analysis for FWER and FDR control.

Run `python scripts/run_pipeline.py` from the project root. The pipeline must first map `input` to `cleaned` and then map `cleaned` to `output`. Use `output/results.json` to populate the following tables.

## 2. FWER control

| method | estimated_fwer |
|---|---:|
| uncorrected | 0.9583333333333334 |
| bonferroni | 0.041666666666666664 |
| holm | 0.041666666666666664 |

## 3. FDR and power

| method | estimated_fdr | estimated_power |
|---|---:|---:|
| uncorrected | 0.17675483081733082 | 0.6166666666666666 |
| benjamini_hochberg | 0.02232142857142857 | 0.2888888888888889 |
| benjamini_yekutieli | 0.00486111111111111 | 0.11 |

## 4. Brief interpretation

FWER corrections reduce false family-level discoveries under the complete null. FDR procedures target expected false-discovery share and usually preserve more power than strict family-wise controls.
